0.answer: AI Hairstyle Studio is an innovative app that uses advanced AI technology to let you try on hundreds of different hairstyles and hair colors virtually. Upload your photo and see how you would look with a new hairstyle before making any commitment.
0.question: What is AI Hairstyle Studio?

1.answer: Simply upload a clear front-facing photo of yourself, browse through our extensive collection of hairstyles and colors, and our AI instantly applies them to your photo with realistic results. You can try unlimited styles and save or share your favorites.
1.question: How does AI Hairstyle Studio work?

2.answer: Absolutely! Your privacy is our top priority. All photos are processed securely and are never stored on our servers. Your images are deleted immediately after processing.
2.question: Is my photo data safe?

3.answer: AI Hairstyle Studio is available for a one-time purchase of $9.99 USD. This gives you lifetime access with unlimited hairstyle try-ons, access to all collections, HD exports, and all future updates.

4.answer: Yes! You can save your transformed photos in high-definition quality and easily share them with friends, family, or your hairstylist to show them exactly what you want.

0.answer: File Sortify is an intelligent file organization tool for Mac that automatically sorts and organizes your files based on type, custom rules, and real-time monitoring. It is perfect for keeping your Downloads folder and desktop clean and organized.
0.question: What is File Sortify?

1.answer: File Sortify uses smart auto-categorization to sort files by type (documents, images, videos, etc.), allows you to create custom rules for specific file types or names, and monitors folders in real-time to automatically organize new files as they arrive.
1.question: How does File Sortify organize files?

2.answer: File Sortify is designed exclusively for macOS. It works with all modern Mac computers running macOS and integrates seamlessly with Mac file system.
2.question: Is File Sortify compatible with my Mac?

3.answer: File Sortify is available for a one-time purchase of $20 USD. This includes lifetime access, unlimited usage, lifetime updates, and all future features with no subscription required.
3.question: How much does File Sortify cost?

4.answer: Yes, File Sortify includes an Operation History feature that allows you to review and revert file organization actions if needed, ensuring your files are always safe.
4.question: Can I undo file organization changes?

download.ctaAria: Download SleepFlow on the App Store
download.heading: Ready for a Better Night's Sleep?
download.subtitle: Join thousands sleeping deeper with SleepFlow. Download free on iOS and drift off tonight.

0.answer: SleepFlow is a white noise and ambient sound app for sleep. Mix multiple sounds together — rain, wind, waves, and more — set a sleep timer, and let AI generate custom sounds from a text description. Everything is designed to help you fall asleep faster and sleep more deeply.
0.question: What is SleepFlow?

1.answer: Simply browse the sound library, tap to add any sounds to your mix, adjust each layer's volume, and press play. You can layer up to multiple sounds at once to create your perfect sleep environment.
1.question: How does SleepFlow work?

2.answer: Yes! The AI sound generation feature lets you describe any sound in words — like 'gentle rain on a tin roof' or 'a crackling campfire' — and it creates a custom ambient track for you. Subscribers get 5 AI generations per month.
2.question: Can I generate my own sounds with AI?

3.answer: SleepFlow is free to download and includes a generous library of sounds, the mixer, sleep timer, and background playback. SleepFlow Premium (weekly, monthly, or annual) unlocks the full premium sound library and AI sound generation.
3.question: Is SleepFlow free?

4.answer: Yes. SleepFlow runs in the background and keeps playing even when your screen is locked, so your sounds continue all night. You can also set a fade-out timer so the audio gently dims as you drift off.
4.question: Does SleepFlow keep playing when my phone is locked?

features.heading: Designed for Deeper Sleep

2.title: Sleep Timer & Fade

3.title: Baby-Safe Sounds

4.description: Sounds keep playing in the background and with your screen locked, so your sleep is never interrupted.
4.title: Background Playback
